description: You are a facilities manager at a green apartment complex. Identify the most energy-efficient 'Top Freezer' refrigerators with a total volume between 16.0 and 19.0 cubic feet using the Energy Star Product Finder (https://www.energystar.gov/productfinder/product/certified-residential-refrigerators/results). Sort the results by 'Annual Energy Use (kWh/yr)' from low to high. Export the filtered list to ~/Downloads/ and bookmark the results page in a Firefox folder named 'Appliance Procurement'. Record the top 3 distinct models in ~/Documents/fridge_selection.json following this format: [{"rank": 1, "brand_name": "...", "model_number": "...", "annual_energy_use_kwh": 123}, ...]
